allow: Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cd ~/buyBackSite && docker compose build 2>&1")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cd ~ && tar -xzf buybacksite.tar.gz && echo ''Extracted OK'' && ls buyBackSite/")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cd ~/buyBackSite && docker compose build 2>&1 | tail -20")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cd ~/buyBackSite && nohup docker compose build > ~/docker-build.log 2>&1 & echo ''Build started, PID:'' $!")

Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-mysql-1 mysql -u root -pPassword1 -e ""ALTER USER ''admin''@''%'' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY ''Password1''; GRANT ALL ON *.* TO ''admin''@''%''; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"" && echo ''MySQL auth fixed''")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="curl -s -H ''Host: admin.sellmyiphone.dv'' http://localhost:8080/ | head -20")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="curl -s -H ''Host: admin.sellmyiphone.dv'' http://localhost:8080/ 2>&1 | grep -o ''class=""exception_message"">[^<]*'' | head -5")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-php-apache-1 bash -c ''tail -20 /var/log/httpd/error_log 2>/dev/null || tail -20 /etc/httpd/logs/error_log 2>/dev/null''")

Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-mysql-1 mysql -uadmin -pPassword1 admin_panel -e ''CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pages \(id int unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, slug varchar\(100\) NOT NULL, title varchar\(255\) NOT NULL, title_tag varchar\(255\) DEFAULT NULL, meta_description varchar\(300\) DEFAULT NULL, content mediumtext, template varchar\(50\) NOT NULL DEFAULT ""default"", published tinyint\(1\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, url varchar\(255\) DEFAULT NULL, updated_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, created_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, PRIMARY KEY \(id\), UNIQUE KEY slug \(slug\)\) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8; SELECT ""pages table created"" AS result;''")

Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-mysql-1 mysql -uadmin -pPassword1 admin_panel -e ""INSERT INTO pages \(slug, title, title_tag, meta_description, content, template, published, url\) VALUES \(''homepage'', ''Sell My iPhone - Get the Best Price'', ''Sell My iPhone - Best Prices Guaranteed'', ''Sell your iPhone for the best price. Free postage, fast payment.'', ''

Welcome to Sell My iPhone

'', ''homepage'', 1, ''/''\); SELECT ''inserted'' AS result;""")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-php-apache-1 bash -c ''tail -30 /etc/httpd/logs/error_log''")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-mysql-1 mysql -uadmin -pPassword1 admin_panel -e ""UPDATE pages SET template=''home'' WHERE slug=''homepage'';""")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cd ~/buyBackSite && docker compose up -d && echo ''Containers started''")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cd ~/buyBackSite && tar xzf ~/seo-changes.tar.gz && echo ''Files extracted:'' && tar tzf ~/seo-changes.tar.gz")
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cat ~/startup.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20 || echo ''no log yet''; docker ps 2>/dev/null | head -5")

Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command='mkdir -p ~/buyBackSite/sellmyiphone/images/blog && cd ~/buyBackSite/sellmyiphone/images/blog && tar xzf ~/blog_thumbnails.tar.gz && ls *.png | wc -l && echo ""Thumbnails extracted""')
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command='bash -c ""cat ~/startup.log; echo ---; docker ps""')
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command='bash -c ""ps aux | grep -E docker | grep -v grep | head -5""')
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command='bash -c ""docker images; echo ---; ls -la ~/startup.log""')

Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command='bash -c ""kill 716 717 718 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; cd ~/buyBackSite && docker compose build --progress plain 2>&1 | tail -3 && docker compose up -d && echo DONE""')
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command='bash -c ""pkill -f \\""docker compose build\\"" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f buildx 2>/dev/null; echo killed""')
Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="cd ~/buyBackSite && nohup docker compose up -d > ~/startup.log 2>&1 & echo ''started''")

Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-mysql-1 mysql -uroot -pPassword1 -e ""ALTER USER ''admin''@''%'' IDENTIFIED WITH mysql_native_password BY ''Password1''; FLUSH PRIVILEGES; SELECT ''MySQL auth fixed'';""")

Bash(gcloud cloud-shell ssh --command="docker exec buybacksite-mysql-1 mysql -uroot -pPassword1 -e ""GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO ''admin''@''%'' WITH GRANT OPTION; FLUSH PRIVILEGES; SELECT ''Grants done'';""")
